title: Perplex3d's FNAF Modpack
description: Five Nights at Freddy's is a popular survival horror game where players must survive nights at a haunted pizzeria while avoiding animatronic characters that come to life after hours. So I decided to make it into a modpack
body: Dive into the world of Five Nights at Freddy's like never before! This exciting modpack brings together an array of thrilling experiences, from terrifying new animatronics to unique gameplay mechanics. Team up with friends or go solo as you navigate haunted pizzerias, solve puzzles, and try to survive the night. With fresh maps, customized skins, and heart-pounding scenarios, the FNAF Perplx3d Modpack is perfect for both seasoned players and newcomers looking for a scare. Get ready for sleepless nights filled with suspense and fun!
